title: Firstborn
overview: A psychological thriller about a middle-aged intellectual who, in an attempt to restore his  reputation in his wife’s eyes, accidentally commits a murder. As time passes, he begins  to see a link between the deceased, his wife’s pregnancy and the mysterious blackmailer  who is forcing him to act against his will.
